enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his day off on May 4, 2014: he cleaned his house, worked on request videos, got a call from his friend Aaron about buying a motocross motorcycle, then went with his mom to see Spider-Man 2 and had dinner. He shares his thoughts on the film and mentions dealing with insomnia before a work day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoyed it but felt the villain's character arc turned evil too quickly; loved the action and 3D experience
intrigued by the idea, especially as a way to access mountain trails before switching to a mountain bike
loves them; the spectacle brings back a sense of childhood wonder

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle slept in a little bit on May 4th, 2014 because he was up late the night before.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle did his monthly house cleaning on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle cleaned up the shavings from his ancestors and put a new hand shaving in.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle swept the floor, mopped the floor, and wiped all the drippy brown crap that was dripping off everything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle swept up the porch and started working on making request videos on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle didn't get around to doing much work on his website on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Aaron
claims.claim: Aaron called Kyle and wanted him to buy a motorcross motorcycle to get up in the mountains.

claims.subject: motorcross motorcycle
claims.claim: A motorcross motorcycle can be bought for around $1,200.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thought about getting a dirt bike like a motorcross motorcycle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle went to see Spider-Man 2 with his brother and mom on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle went to a restaurant with his brother and mom, had a meal and a couple of beers, and then came home on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was up late on May 4th, 2014 and felt tired when he woke up the next morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had to ride 10 miles to work in 25 minutes on May 5th, 2014.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle dealt with insomnia and should have made himself sleep earlier on May 4th, 2014.

claims.subject: Spider-Man 2
claims.claim: Kyle thought Spider-Man 2 was good but felt the character arc was a bit too fast.

claims.subject: Spider-Man 2
claims.claim: Kyle thought the action in Spider-Man 2 was cool and the acting was good.

claims.subject: Spider-Man 2
claims.claim: Kyle felt Spider-Man 2 put a negative light on humanity by showing how someone can turn from a best friend into an enemy.

claims.subject: Spider-Man 2
claims.claim: Kyle thought Spider-Man 2 had a little too much of a preview to the next movie.

claims.subject: Marvel comic movies
claims.claim: Kyle loves Marvel comic movies and seeing them in 3D at the theater.

claims.subject: Marvel comic movies
claims.claim: Kyle feels Marvel comic movies bring him back to his childhood.
